reconciliation.horizontal: All three final blind reviewers matched the rendered axis.
reconciliation.vertical: All three final blind reviewers matched the rendered axis after the vertical eye amplitude was reduced to 4.
reconciliation.integrity: Three focused reviewers confirmed a visible gap below the upper eyelid and no hair, ear, face, or eye tearing.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: reduced horizontal eye amplitude to 5 and vertical eye amplitude to 4
